title: Chinese Buddhist: Linji Yulu (Record of Linji) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Linji Yulu (Record of Linji)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Linji Yulu (Record of Linji)

translation.text: From Linji Yulu (Record of Linji): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
